events.title: National voting rights mobilization planned
events.summary: A national mobilization for voting rights, "All Roads Lead to the South," is scheduled for May 16. Led by Black Voters Matter and a coalition of over 90 organizations, the event will feature major gatherings in Alabama, including a prayer gathering in Selma and a rally in Montgomery. The mobilization aims to address recent attacks on voting rights and is part of a sustained summer of organizing for voter mobilization and civic education.
events.why_relevant: The mobilization represents a significant effort to defend voting rights and promote civic engagement.
